selected_fit_status.message: CONVERGENCE: RELATIVE REDUCTION OF F <= FACTR*EPSMCH

method.break_detector: 24-hour adjacent local median shift, 3× local MAD, 24-hour separation
method.bootstrap: deterministic 300-replicate moving-block bootstrap, block 24 hours, 95% interval within longest gap-free segment
method.recalibration: train-only residual median by train Tout tercile; evaluated separately afterwards

train.metric_segment_policy: Bootstrap interval statistics use only the longest contiguous observed sequence; n_samples remains the full split count and contiguous_segment_n is the exact statistic sample count.

validation.metric_segment_policy: Bootstrap interval statistics use only the longest contiguous observed sequence; n_samples remains the full split count and contiguous_segment_n is the exact statistic sample count.

test.metric_segment_policy: Bootstrap interval statistics use only the longest contiguous observed sequence; n_samples remains the full split count and contiguous_segment_n is the exact statistic sample count.

train.bias_model: median residual by train-only Tout tercile

validation.bias_model: median residual by train-only Tout tercile

test.bias_model: median residual by train-only Tout tercile

train.label: unclassified
train.rationale: pattern is neither a clear persistent bias nor weakly correlated noise

validation.label: persistent_bias
validation.rationale: signed median exceeds robust spread and retains one sign for at least 70% of samples

test.label: unclassified
test.rationale: pattern is neither a clear persistent bias nor weakly correlated noise

association_hypotheses_ranked.wording: association only; no causal attribution; Q interpretation retains the fixed Tin-block-A / meter-335546926 caveat

initialization_sensitivity.interpretation: empirical range over sampled initialisations, not a statistical confidence interval

limitations: Residual associations are not causal attributions.
The correction is a diagnostic train-only offset, not an independently identified physical parameter.
Sampled-initialisation ranges are not statistical confidence intervals.
No individual wall, facade, glazing or energy-saving quantity is identified.
